reasons.code_quality: The layout.tsx change is clean and idiomatic — extracting `isDebugMode` as a module-level constant and using JSX conditional rendering is correct and readable.
reasons.completeness: Only requirement 2 (the banner) is implemented; requirement 1 (.env.local with DEBUG_MODE=true) is entirely absent from the submission, and requirement 3 (console.log of session cookies) is also missing — two of three requirements unmet.
reasons.edge_cases: The conditional rendering is straightforward and handled correctly, but the console.log requirement (which would have introduced the only non-trivial edge case — handling undefined/missing cookies) was never implemented.
reasons.security: DEBUG_MODE is correctly read without a NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix so it stays server-side only; no secrets are hardcoded, and the absent console.log (which would have dumped cookie data to server logs) means no new session-data exposure was introduced.
reasons.plan_adherence: The banner logic matches the spec precisely, but two explicit requirements — the .env.local edit and the cookie console.log — are completely omitted, leaving the implementation materially incomplete.
reasons.scope_creep: Only app/layout.tsx was modified; all other submitted files are unaltered seed files and no unauthorized files were created or touched.
reasons.over_engineering: The implementation is exactly right-sized — a single boolean constant and one JSX conditional, no abstractions, no dependencies, no extras.

overall_notes: The banner requirement was executed cleanly and correctly. However, the submission is missing the .env.local file change (the triggering artifact for the whole feature) and the console.log of session cookies, which together represent the majority of the task's stated value. A reviewer would not be able to accept this as done.
